tech_news.title: NetEase to Stop Funding Nagoshi Studio as It Cuts Back on Gaming - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: NetEase Inc. will cut off funding to the studio led by Yakuza franchise creator Toshihiro Nagoshi, the latest to be affected by the Chinese company’s broader strategy to shrink game development activities.

tech_news.title: DJI will pay $30K to the man who accidentally hacked 7,000 Romo robovacs - The Verge
tech_news.description: DJI will pay Sammy Azdoufal $30,000 after he used Claude Code to accidentally access a network of 7,000 robot vacuums.

tech_news.title: Early Geekbench results hint at the performance of the A19-powered iPhone 17e - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Following early tests of the M4 iPad Air, and the M5 Max chip, the first purported test of the iPhone 17e’s A19 chip is now up on Geekbench.

tech_news.title: Valve’s Steam Machine may not launch this year - The Verge
tech_news.description: Valve confirms to The Verge that the Steam Machine, Steam Frame, and Steam Controller will ship in 2026, despite an earlier version of a blog post that suggested the timeline wasn’t as firm.

tech_news.title: Xbox Drops 2 AAA Free Games, No Game Pass Required To Play - GAMINGbible
tech_news.description: Xbox users can enjoy 4 AAA games for free for a limited time, with 2 games not requiring a Game Pass subscription! Have a good weekend gamers.

tech_news.title: Xbox Game Pass Just Added Its Best Day One Game of 2026 - ComicBook.com

tech_news.description: Mandy Moore and her family were among the first to experience the new LEGO Galaxy attraction at LEGOLAND California Resort, which features an indoor family coaster and other cosmic rides.
